render_data.title: Corrosion of zinc-plated iron nails — NaCl concentration vs average mass lost
render_data.trend: Positive correlation: as NaCl concentration increases, average mass lost increases.

image_prompt: SVG: nuclear fission on a dark background — an incoming neutron strikes a nucleus (cluster of red protons and grey neutrons), which splits releasing several neutrons and an energy burst. Labels: Neutron, Nucleus, energy released; legend for proton/neutron.

render_data.title: Nuclear fission chain reaction of uranium-235

stages.label: 1 — Neutron collides
stages.particles: A free neutron strikes a uranium-235 nucleus

stages.label: 2 — Unstable nucleus
stages.particles: U-235 absorbs the neutron and becomes unstable

stages.label: 3 — Nucleus splits
stages.particles: Splits into barium-141 + krypton-92, releasing energy and 2–3 neutrons

stages.label: 4 — Chain reaction
stages.particles: Released neutrons strike further U-235 nuclei, sustaining the chain reaction
